name: @glp1search/mcp-server
description: Access the largest GLP-1 provider directory. Search 18,000+ clinics, compare medications, check side effects.

tools.name: search_providers
tools.description: Search 18,000+ GLP-1 medication providers by name, city, state, type, or medication.

tools.name: get_provider
tools.description: Get full details for a specific GLP-1 provider by slug.

tools.name: compare_providers
tools.description: Compare 2-3 GLP-1 providers side by side on pricing, ratings, and medications.

tools.name: get_medication_info
tools.description: Get detailed info about a GLP-1 medication including dosing, cost, and weight loss data.

tools.name: list_medications
tools.description: List all GLP-1 medications with key stats and approval status.

tools.name: get_side_effect_info
tools.description: Get info about a GLP-1 side effect including management tips and when to seek help.

tools.name: find_cheapest_providers
tools.description: Find lowest-cost GLP-1 providers in a specific state or city.

tools.name: get_faq
tools.description: Answer common GLP-1 questions about medications, costs, side effects, and more.
